case_title: JOHN GARCIA VS. EBAY COMMERCE INC.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE OF SC-100 MAILED CERTIFIED **NO SIGNATURE/SEE RECD BY/SIGNATURE LINE** FILED BY PLAINTIFF GARCIA, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT EBAY COMMERCE INC.
TRIAL RESET TO JAN-13-2023 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF DEC-22-2022 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF GARCIA, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT EBAY COMMERCE INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-13-2023 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION FOR STATUS UPDATE TO FEB-17-2023 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JOHN GARCIA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT EBAY COMMERCE, INC. IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY GARCIA, JOHN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-17-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-17-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM WILLIAM LYNN. PLAINTIFF JOHN GARCIA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT EBAY COMMERCE INC. IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGEPROTEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $670.00 FILED BY GARCIA, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT EBAY COMMERCE INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-04-2022 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GARCIA, JOHN
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF GARCIA, JOHN
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR CURING UNTIMELY FILING OF PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-07-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO DEC-22-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JOHN GARCIA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT EBAY COMMERCE INC. IS NOT PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON SEP-29-2022 IS DEEMED DEFECTIVE. PROOF OF SERVICE SERVED TO "EBAY COMMERCE INC." IS NOT A CORRECT AGENT FOR SERVICE. CONTINUED THE MATTER FOR PROPER PROOF OF SERVICE AND FOR PLAINTIFF TO RE-DO SEVICE TO AN AGENT FOR SERVICE THAT AS LISTED ON SECRETARY OF STATE WEBSITE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-17-2023 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GARCIA, JOHN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EBAY COMMERCE INC. $468.49 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $533.49 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-04-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO SEP-29-2022 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JOHN GARCIA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT EBAY COMMERCE INC IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SC-100 (SERVICE FEE $65) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GARCIA, JOHN SERVED SEP-06-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT EBAY COMMERCE INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-29-2022 - CONTINUED TO CURING UNTIMELY FILING OF PROOF OF SERVICE TO NOV-07-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JOHN GARCIA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT EBAY COMMERCE INC. IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF PRESENTS PROOF OF SERVICE HAS BEEN SERVED TO DEFENDANT BY REGISTERED PROCESS SERVER THAT HAS NOT BEEN FILED WITH THE COURT. PROOF OF SERVICE IS REQUIRED TO BE FILED AT LEAST 5 DAYS BEFORE THE COURT DAY. PLAINTIFF IS INSTRUCTED TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE AT THE CLERK'S OFFICE. PLAINTIFF NOT REQUIRED TO REDO-SERVICE ON DEFENDANT EBAY COMMERCE INC.. ALL PARTIES MUST APPEAR TO BE HEARD. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$0.00) SERVED DEC-16-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT EBAY COMMERCE INC.
ORDER CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF NO SIGNATURE**SEE SIGNATURE/RECD BY LINE** SERVED JUN-24-2022, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT EBAY COMMERCE INC.
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF GARCIA, JOHN
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
